mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( username, email, first_name, last_name, password, created, created_at ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{email}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{password}, NOW(), NOW() );
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, telephone = #{telephone}, email = #{email}, signature_photo = #{signature}, is_active = #{isActive}, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW(), modified_by = COALESCE(#{modifiedBy}, 1) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS id, u.public_id::text AS publicKey, COALESCE(u.signature_photo, '') AS signaturePhoto, COALESCE(u.user_type, 0) AS userType, COALESCE(u.first_name, '') AS firstName, COALESCE(u.last_name, '') AS lastName, COALESCE(u.username, '') AS username, COALESCE(u.password, '') AS password, COALESCE(u.email, '') AS email, COALESCE(u.telephone, '') AS telephone, COALESCE(TO_CHAR(u.expire_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '') AS expireDate, primary_h.hospital_id AS hospitalId, primary_h.hospital_public_key AS hospitalPublicKey, COALESCE(primary_h.hospital_code, '') AS hospitalCode, COALESCE(primary_h.hospital_name, '') AS hospitalName, u.created_by AS createdById, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(uc.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(uc.last_name, ''))), ''), uc.username, '' ) AS createdBy, COALESCE(TO_CHAR(COALESCE(u.created_at, u.created), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '') AS created, u.modified_by AS modifiedById, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(um.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(um.last_name, ''))), ''), um.username, '' ) AS modifiedBy, COALESCE(TO_CHAR(COALESCE(u.modified_at, u.modified), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '') AS modified FROM users u LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT h.id AS hospital_id, h.public_id::text AS hospital_public_key, h.code AS hospital_code, h.name AS hospital_name FROM user_hospitals uh INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = uh.hospital_id AND h.is_active = 1 WHERE uh.user_id = u.id AND uh.is_active = 1 ORDER BY uh.is_default DESC, uh.hospital_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) primary_h ON true LEFT JOIN users uc ON uc.id = u.created_by LEFT JOIN users um ON um.id = u.modified_by WHERE u.is_active = 1 AND u.id = #{userId}
SELECT id AS id, email AS email, username AS username, password AS password FROM users WHERE is_active = 1 AND username = #{username} LIMIT 01
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_type = #{userType}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, telephone = #{telephone}, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW(), modified_by = #{modifiedBy} WHERE id = #{id};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_hospitals (user_id, hospital_id, is_default, is_active, created, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{hospitalId}, #{isDefault}, 1, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, hospital_id) DO UPDATE SET is_default = #{isDefault}, is_active = 1, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW();
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM hospitals WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.delete: UPDATE users SET modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW(), modified_by = COALESCE(#{modifiedBy}, 1), is_active = 2 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.id AS id, r.public_id::text AS publicKey, NULL AS sys_code, r.name AS name, COALESCE(r.created_at, r.created) AS created, r.created_by AS created_by, COALESCE(r.modified_at, r.modified) AS modified, r.modified_by AS modified_by, r.is_active AS is_active FROM roles r INNER JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.role_id = r.id WHERE r.is_active = 1 AND ug.is_active = 1 AND ug.user_id = #{id} ORDER BY r.id DESC;

SELECT h.id AS id, h.public_id::text AS publicKey, uh.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(h.code, ''), '') AS code, COALESCE(NULLIF(h.abbr, ''), '') AS abbr, h.name AS name, uh.is_default AS isDefault FROM user_hospitals uh INNER JOIN hospitals h ON uh.hospital_id = h.id WHERE uh.user_id = #{userId} AND uh.is_active = 1 AND h.is_active = 1 ORDER BY uh.is_default DESC, h.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_groups ug JOIN roles r ON r.id = ug.role_id WHERE ug.user_id = #{userId} AND ug.is_active = 1 AND r.is_active = 1 AND UPPER(COALESCE(r.code, '')) = UPPER(#{roleCode})
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users u JOIN user_hospitals uh ON uh.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.is_active = 1 AND uh.is_active = 1 AND uh.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
SELECT uh.hospital_id FROM user_hospitals uh WHERE uh.user_id = #{userId} AND uh.is_active = 1 ORDER BY uh.is_default DESC, uh.hospital_id ASC LIMIT 1
